egg-separator-tool.name: Egg Yolk Separator
egg-separator-tool.description: Separates yolks from whites for baking without the mess.
egg-separator-tool.longDescription: Separate yolks from whites for baking with a food-safe tool that sits over a bowl. Less mess than shell juggling and easy to rinse. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

laundry-lint-remover.name: Fabric Lint Remover Shaver
laundry-lint-remover.description: Removes pills and fuzz from sweaters, couches, and coats.
laundry-lint-remover.longDescription: Refresh sweaters and upholstery by shaving pills and lint into the catcher tray. USB rechargeable so you are not hunting batteries. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

ankle-weights-pair.name: Adjustable Ankle Strap Pair
ankle-weights-pair.description: Cable-machine ankle straps for glute and leg workouts at home.
ankle-weights-pair.longDescription: Tone legs and glutes on walks or mat workouts with padded ankle weights that strap securely. Pair included for balanced training. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

pill-organizer-weekly.name: Weekly Pill Organizer
pill-organizer-weekly.description: Seven-day compartments keep vitamins and meds sorted.
pill-organizer-weekly.longDescription: Sort vitamins and medications into labeled day compartments so morning and night doses stay clear. Compact enough for travel bags. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

reusable-gel-ice-pack.name: Reusable Hot & Cold Gel Pack
reusable-gel-ice-pack.description: Soothes sore muscles — freeze for cold or warm for heat therapy.
reusable-gel-ice-pack.longDescription: Ease sore muscles with a flexible gel pack you freeze for cold therapy or warm for heat. Soft cover stays comfortable against skin. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

phone-tripod-flexible.name: Bluetooth Selfie Stick Tripod
phone-tripod-flexible.description: Extendable selfie stick with tripod base for photos and live video.
phone-tripod-flexible.longDescription: Wrap flexible legs around poles, bed frames, or desk edges for hands-free photos and video calls. Universal clamp fits most phones with cases. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.

desk-mouse-pad-extended.name: Extended Desk Mouse Pad
desk-mouse-pad-extended.description: Wide mat covers keyboard and mouse for a cleaner desk setup.
desk-mouse-pad-extended.longDescription: Cover your keyboard and mouse zone with a stitched desk mat that stays put and cleans easily. Smooth tracking surface for daily work. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.
